description: Looking to automate some backend processes with Python. Can teach you advanced vanilla JavaScript DOM manipulation or async/await patterns in return!
I have an analytics project and need some beautiful UI designs in Figma. In exchange, I can teach you pandas, NumPy, and python script automations.
Hey developers! I am a visual designer wanting to learn how to code my layouts in basic HTML and CSS. I will teach you Figma vector layouts and responsive design fundamentals.
